presets.name: Tutorial
presets.description: Quick demo: runs in 30 seconds. Best for first-time presenters.

presets.name: Default
presets.description: Baseline configuration — reloads from config.json or hardcoded defaults

presets.name: Speedy Evolution
presets.description: Large population, high mutation, big tournament — converges fast

presets.name: Precise Timing
presets.description: Near-miss fitness rewards brains that jump at the last possible moment

presets.name: Jump Efficiency
presets.description: Brains are penalized for unnecessary jumps — only jump when needed

presets.name: Pure Survival
presets.description: Simplest fitness — only raw distance matters, no bonuses or penalties

presets.name: Chaos Mode
presets.description: High mutation, no elitism, tiny tournament — wild diversity every generation

presets.name: Elite Guard
presets.description: High elitism keeps top brains — observe stagnation and premature convergence
